description: CompositionBlack hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, a full zippered placket, drawstrings for the hood, printed branding on the left chest, two pockets in the sides and a ribbed hemFitComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetModerate warm ironWelcome the winter in style this season with this sweatshirt from nike. The fabric is sure to keep the winter chill at bay, while you look stylish with the sharp silhouetting. Wear this sweatshirt over jeans to keep the cold wind away.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
